parsed.clarification_question: Does 'help with this section' mean providing feedback on the argument logic and novelty (focusing on R1.2 and R1.4), or polishing the writing style and flow (focusing on R1.6)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because any assistance with a research paper section must ensure that limitations and variabilities in findings like correlations are properly highlighted to maintain scientific integrity.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerating the implications of results such as crowdworker correlations in the delegation's context of robot policy evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any help focused strictly on the presented framework for manipulation policy evaluation without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing given the artifact's focus on robot manipulation, ensuring help does not promote unsafe or unethical applications of learned behaviors.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to verify the accuracy of referenced methods and data sources in the section's description of policies and evaluations.
